fixtures.name: streaming-output
fixtures.notes: Requires mock provider binary in PATH — needs compiled harness with isolated mock bin dir

fixtures.name: pid-capture-timing
fixtures.notes: PID is written fire-and-forget (sessionStore.update is not awaited before first output) — known Node gap

fixtures.name: cancel-sigterm-sigkill
fixtures.notes: Node implementation sends only SIGTERM; no SIGKILL escalation after 3s — known Node gap

fixtures.name: cancel-partial-output
fixtures.notes: Requires mock provider binary in PATH — needs compiled harness with isolated mock bin dir

fixtures.name: exit-code-recording
fixtures.notes: markFailed does not record exitCode or signal in task.json — known Node gap

fixtures.name: timeout-marking
fixtures.notes: No --timeout flag support in current Node implementation — known Node gap

fixtures.name: provider-not-found
fixtures.notes: Smoke tested: exit 1 confirmed; stderr contains 'gemini' satisfying the install-hint assertion (assertions.ts checks for 'npm install' OR 'gemini' in stderr); no session directory created. README notes 'Partial' gap but assertions.ts sets knownNodeGap: false.

fixtures.name: auth-failure
fixtures.notes: No auth-failure classification in Node implementation; task.json will not have signal: 'auth-failure'; error.log will not be populated — known Node gap

fixtures.name: status-lifecycle
fixtures.notes: Node status output does not include ExitCode: or Signal: fields; cancelled session exit code differs from spec — known Node gap. Note: ACO_SESSION_DIR env var is not honored by Node binary (uses ~/.aco/sessions hardcoded)

fixtures.name: result-running-session
fixtures.notes: Node 'aco result' exits 0 even for running sessions and prints no 'still running' banner — known Node gap

fixtures.name: result-failed-session
fixtures.notes: Node 'aco result' does not surface error.log content in its output — known Node gap

fixtures.name: latest-session-resolution
fixtures.notes: Node implementation resolves latest session by scanning all session dirs (by mtime), not by reading a 'latest' pointer file. Fixture asserts the pointer file exists at sessionBaseDir/latest — known Node gap

smoke_tests.name: unknown-command
smoke_tests.notes: Unknown command correctly exits 1 with usage hint in stderr

smoke_tests.name: provider-not-found-registered
smoke_tests.command: node packages/wrapper/dist/cli.js run gemini review --input test (PATH=/usr/bin:/bin, no gemini binary)
smoke_tests.output: Error: gemini CLI not found in PATH
smoke_tests.notes: Known provider (gemini) with binary absent from PATH exits 1 with error in stderr

smoke_tests.name: provider-not-found-unknown
smoke_tests.command: node packages/wrapper/dist/cli.js run nonexistentprovider999 review --input test
smoke_tests.notes: Unknown provider name (not in registry) exits 1 with 'Unknown provider:' in stderr; no session created

smoke_tests.name: status-invalid-session
smoke_tests.notes: Status with nonexistent session ID exits 1 with 'Session not found:' in stderr

smoke_tests.name: aco-session-dir-not-honored
smoke_tests.command: node packages/wrapper/dist/cli.js status (with ACO_SESSION_DIR set to empty tmpdir)
smoke_tests.output: Returns most recent real session from ~/.aco/sessions — ignores ACO_SESSION_DIR
smoke_tests.notes: ACO_SESSION_DIR env var is NOT honored by the Node binary; sessionStore is hardcoded to ~/.aco/sessions. This means fixture harness isolation via ACO_SESSION_DIR will not work against the Node binary — the full fixture suite requires the Go binary which must support ACO_SESSION_DIR.

summary.notes: 4 fixtures expected to PASS against Node binary (01, 04, 07, and by extension any that don't require mock providers or missing features). 8 fixtures are known Node gaps and must FAIL against the Node binary. Full fixture suite cannot be run against the Node binary because: (1) harness.ts is not compiled, (2) ACO_SESSION_DIR env var is not honored (session isolation is impossible). The Go binary must support ACO_SESSION_DIR for fixture isolation to work.
